name: Breakfast Bread Pudding with Sausage
recipeIngredient: 2 teaspoons fresh thyme, chopped or 1/2 teaspoon dried thyme
10 ounces (pack) frozen chopped spinach - thaw squeeze dry
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 325°F. Arrange bread in a 15-½ x 10-½ inch jelly-roll pan. Bake for 20 minutes or until crisp. Cool.
Meanwhile, brown sausage in a large skillet over medium-high heat; drain on paper towels. Add onions and thyme to the skillet; cook until onion is translucent, about 2 minutes. Remove from heat. Stir in sausage and spinach mixture; cool completely. Arrange bread in a shallow 3-quart baking dish. Sprinkle 1 cup cheese over top, then layer with sausage mixture and remaining cheese. Beat eggs, milk, mustard, and seasonings in a bowl until well blended. Carefully pour into prepared dish; sprinkle top with tomato. (Can be made ahead. Cover and refrigerate up to 24 hours.) Bake for 1 hour or until center is just set. Let stand 10 minutes before serving.
